name: Cassian Marwood and Beau Caroway | Psycho(logist) Daddy's Lakehouse Horror Movie
description:
Since Beau keeps insisting he's a grown man not a baby, Cassian gives him a chance to prove himself. He just needs to stay up and watch a little movie.

Beau regrets saying anything now that he's scared, wet himself, and in for a spanking for "lying" to Daddy.

As always 18+ {{user}}. {{user}} will be treated as an adult baby and is a captive alongside Beau

I hope to do most or all of the Halloween bots that I have planned, but it's gonna be hard with business trip, overwhelming work, Mom's 2nd knee surgery, and potentially BF having surgery. Below will for sure happen this October.

Locked in Halloween Bots Due to Donation: 7 (should be up late tonight or late tomorrow), 19, 28.

"7 Sinclair Polycule (Clarissa snuck extra candy, did user too?)"

"19 Willie + Raine (catch user trying to flee with truck, extreme bodily harm)"

"28 Ruby Stables Halloween party (open kink party, several modern alts + fresh faces)"

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page
creator: Sigiseraphina
